global_xyz._role: PERSISTENT agent state: [x, y, z, alive_flag], x,y normalized [0,1]. Double-buffered; isStateSurface (name ends _xyz) → persisted (NOT swapped) end-of-frame so the sim continues from the last buffer. Read by deposit (VS Load) + agentField (Load); rewritten by agentField via MRT SV_Target0. Created elsewhere (pointsEmit); rgba32f full-float per reference state-texture rule.
global_xyz._note: Sizing comes from the particle pipeline stateSize (set by pointsEmit), not this effect. NOT a private texture of lenia.

global_vel._role: PERSISTENT agent state: [vx, vy, age, seed]. Double-buffered; isStateSurface (name ends _vel) → persisted end-of-frame. Read by agentField (Load); rewritten by agentField via MRT SV_Target1. Created by pointsEmit.

global_rgba._role: PERSISTENT agent state: [r, g, b, a] agent color. Double-buffered; isStateSurface (name ends _rgba) → persisted end-of-frame. Read by agentField (Load); rewritten unchanged by agentField via MRT SV_Target2. Created by pointsEmit.

global_lenia_density._role: TRANSIENT private accumulation (recomputed each frame): r=summed agent deposits. Cleared (clear), scattered into additively (deposit, Blend One One), read by convolve. Half-resolution. Double-buffered global surface but NOT isStateSurface (no _xyz/_vel/_rgba/_trail/state) → swapped (not persisted).

global_lenia_field._role: TRANSIENT private field (recomputed each frame): r=convolved U field. Written by convolve, sampled by agentField. Half-resolution.

feedback._comment: Agent / multi-pass / MRT / points-scatter sim. PERSISTENT state lives in three 'global_' particle surfaces global_xyz/global_vel/global_rgba (created by an upstream pointsEmit, sized by stateSize). They are isStateSurface (names end _xyz/_vel/_rgba) → end-of-frame the runtime PERSISTS their final read/write bindings (no swap, ref 04 §10.7) so the simulation carries state across frames. The agentField pass reads all three (textureLoad) + the field and rewrites all three via MRT (SV_Target0/1/2 = outXYZ/outVel/outRGBA) — in-place feedback (within-frame ping-pong, §10.2). The two private textures global_lenia_density and global_lenia_field are TRANSIENT (recomputed each frame: clear → deposit → convolve → sample); they are double-buffered globals but NOT state surfaces, so they swap rather than persist. The deposit pass uses drawMode:'points' with count = stateSize*stateSize (one DrawProcedural Points vertex per agent texel; vertex-stage reads global_xyz via SV_VertexID) and additive Blend One One. No '_iteration' uniform is injected; no repeat. MRT true (3 attachments on agentField).
